case_title: HILLSBORO PROPERTIES VS ROBERTS MARY F

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ROBERTS MARY F IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT HILLSBORO PROPERTIES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $351.00 FILED BY HILLSBORO PROPERTIES AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTS MARY F ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTS MARY F
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-03-1991, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO OCT-18-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $500.00 FILED BY ROBERTS MARY F AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HILLSBORO PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF HILLSBORO PROPERTIES
POS ON SUBPOENA FILED AS TO CARL GOLDSTONE FOR 10-18-91, NOT SERVED 10 DAYS PRIOR HRG.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILLSBORO PROPERTIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBERTS MARY F $351.00 PRINCIPAL, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $364.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
